title: Tsuwriyshadday #6701
definition:
Zurishaddai = "my rock is almighty"

 1) father of Shelumiel, the chief of the Simeonites at the time of
    the exodus
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zurishaddai = "my rock is almighty"

 1) father of Shelumiel, the chief of the Simeonites at the time of
    the exodus

    NASB:  my rock is the Almighty, a Simeonite
